abilities: Let's put that pain to use.
We got them where we want them! (friendly)
You should've stuck with your squad.
What a hero. (caging an Overwatch agent)
How about you be the test subject this time? (caging Moira )
You can't escape death, remember? (caging Reaper )
Sing me a tune, doctor. (caging Sigma )
You know what I do when I see a spider? (caging Widowmaker )
I just wanna give you a big hug. (caging Winston or Wrecking Ball )
chatter: A gun in each hand and a smile on my face!
Loosen up. This is supposed to be fun.
Stick with me, and you'll climb straight to the top.
Oooh... time to break some hearts.
You got the demon on your side.
You leave a winner, or in a coffin.
Everybody, stay where I can see you!
We're gonna have a hell of a time!
You'll be safer if you stick with me!
You and me, Baptiste. You and me. (with Baptiste on team)
Let's make them regret challenging us.
Only winners allowed on this team.
*laughs* That was pretty good. Let's do it again.
It's okay. We'll just wipe them out this time!
No one saw that, right? Good. Let's do better this time.
That was embarrassing. Let's make sure they don't live to tell anyone.
Last chance to give 'em everything we got!
Again! Till I say it's over.
Not bad. Not bad at all.
Okay. Let's take things up a notch.
Aw, fun's over. (eliminated with Kill Streak)
For once, I'm early to the party!
Nowhere to run, nowhere to hide.
Just like old times. (healed by Baptiste )
I owe you! And I always pay my debts.
Enemy's being revived. Guess we got to kill them again.
It feels good to be appreciated.
You know what? I'll take it!
call-outs: We're outnumbered. It's getting crazy here!
Aw, look at this little turret.
Hold them off, and they're done.
This is it. Win or lose, it's on you.
Time's running out! Get 'em and we win this thing!
eliminations: I just wanted to be friends.
That's what you call "style and substance".
Forced retirement does wonders. (eliminating Ana , Cassidy , Reinhardt , Soldier: 76 or Torbjörn )
Sorry, buddy. You had it coming. (eliminating Baptiste )
Your problem's all work and no play! (eliminating Bastion , Reinhardt or Torbjörn )
Ho-ho, the shareholders ain't gonna like that! (eliminating Domina )
Ha! That was got way more fun. (eliminating Emre )
Cleaning up the junk! (eliminating Junker Queen , Junkrat , or Roadhog )
Whew! I'm a pretty tough guy. (eliminating another Mauga )
Don't think I forgot about you, buddy. (eliminating Reaper , Sombra or Widowmaker )
Trusting me was your first mistake. (eliminating any Talon hero)
Aww... didn't see you down there. (eliminating Torbjörn or Tracer )
Like you said: I'm "power personified!" (eliminating Vendetta )
Here lies a champion. (eliminating Wrecking Ball )
Don't mess with us hot heads!
Doc, you're gonna get a heatstroke! (eliminating any Support hero; removed)
You got a heatstroke, doc?! (eliminating any Support hero)
We've reached melting point! (eliminating any Omnic hero)
I smell a barbecue! (eliminating Winston or Wrecking Ball )
I'm a one-man anti-aircraft plan. (eliminating airborne enemy)
Not so fast! (eliminating enemy using movement ability)
Buddy, I'm embarrassed for ya! (eliminating Nano-Boosted enemy)
You need to stay down. (eliminating resurrected enemy)
Sitting ducks get shot. (eliminating immobilized enemy)
Damn! It's like I got three hearts! (while Nano-Boosted by Ana)
Where do you think you're going? (eliminating Life Gripped enemy)
We still got it, buddy! (eliminating enemy while assisted by Baptiste 's Amplification Matrix)
Ha! You should look before you punch. (eliminating Doomfist using Rocket Punch)
Oooh! Watch your temper, your highness. (eliminating Junker Queen using Rampage)
*howls* (eliminating enemy while assisted by Kiriko 's Kitsune Rush)
Get off your beanstalk. (eliminating Lifeweaver using Petal Platform)
Don't you just love it when angels fall... (eliminating Mercy using Valkyrie)
My man, let it go. (eliminating Ramattra using Annihilation)
Heard you the first time, brother! (eliminating Reaper using Death Blossom)
*laughs* You missed, porkie pie! (eliminating Roadhog using Whole Hog)
Think I didn't see ya? (eliminating Sombra using Stealth)
You almost had me, Sombs, but, come on... (eliminating Sombra while Hacked)
Oh! Why so angry, my furry friend? (eliminating Winston using Primal Rage)
Felt good, didn't it, monk? (eliminating enemy inflicted with Zenyatta 's Discord Orb)
Are you gonna let me get away with this?
Feels good to get the blood flowin'!
*laugh* I could make this a habit!
There's plenty of me to go around!
Pull your own weight next time!
Now we know who's bigger. (eliminating Doomfist or Sigma )
Touched up that pretty face of yours! (eliminating Lifeweaver )
Ha ha! Punched a ghost. (eliminating Reaper )
Turret's taken care of. You're welcome.
Whoa! Leave some for me, will ya?
There's the Bap I remember! (to Baptiste )
Way to stick it to 'em, princess! (to Domina )
interactions: Mauga : How are you liking Samoa, Ana? Ana : It'd be better in different company. Mauga : Oh, I see... you think we oughta ditch these other losers and get a glass of vaifala? Ana : *sighs* You're buying first round.
Mauga : Wanna see me throw B.O.B. like a basketball? Ashe : Hands off. He ain't your toy. Mauga : ...Yet.
Ashe : I hear the fishing's great where you're from . Mauga : Our fish might be a little big for you. Ashe : *chuckle* There's nothing I can't catch with determination and a little dynamite.
Baptiste : I'll be backing you up, so try not to do something too stupid. Mauga : You know me, Baptiste: just the right amount of stupid.
Mauga : Why'd you have to go and grow a conscience? Baptiste : Huh. After all we've seen, how could you not? Mauga : I got a short memory, except for what I'm owed.
Baptiste : I'm done with Talon . Nothing can make me change my mind-- not even you. Mauga : Saves me time. Dragging you back is faster!

Baptiste : Why are you staying with Talon ? Fighting for Vendetta is crazy, even for you. Mauga : Aw, gimme some more credit. You know I only stick around when I'm getting something out of it. Baptiste : *sigh* That's exactly what I'm worried about.
Cassidy : Must cost a fortune to spill all those bullets. Mauga : Good thing I'm not paying for 'em!

Mauga : How 'bout you and I go rob a place together sometime? Maybe the Louvre? Domina : What do you take me for, a petty thief? Mauga : Hah, we're both stealing, princess! You just do it from a boardroom.

Mauga : You ever drop the whole "corporate" act? Let the mask slip? Domina : "Mask?" I haven't the faintest idea what you mean, Malosi. Mauga : Hey! I know better than most that appearances can be deceiving... Domina : Perhaps your charms are a farce, but I assure you, mine are not.

Mauga : They aren't ready for this! One of three: Domina : Remember your inside voice, Malosi. Lifeweaver : Perhaps... we should use our inside voices? Mei : Um... can you use your... i-inside voice? Mauga : This is my inside voice!
Mauga : You ever worry the fist is making you rusty? Doomfist : Hmph. How about a match after this? To address your... concerns.

Mauga : Haven't seen you in a while, Emmy. Where have you been? Emre : Nowhere you need to know about. Mauga : *groans* I thought all that time away might chill you out, but you're still the same old killjoy. Emre : If that means I'm still on your bad side, I'll take it as a good sign.

Mauga : So, you're the new kid on the block? I like your crossbow. Freja : Hm. Thanks. Mauga : Looks kinda heavy... maybe I oughta carry it for you? Freja : There's still a bounty on your head, Malosi. Don't make me turn it in.
Mauga : I'd get a bigger sword, if I were you. Genji : What counts is the sharpness of the blade, and the mind of the wielder. Mauga : I said a bigger sword, not bigger words.
Mauga : How about you fly me up, and I'll make it rain fire? Jetpack Cat : *doubtful meows*
Mauga : Where do I sign up for the Scrapyard ? Junker Queen : Fresh meat, eh? Well, try not to bore me. Mauga : Was just gonna say the same.
Junkrat : I was thinking of becoming an underwear model. How does one get pecs as hulking as yours? Mauga : You wouldn't like it. Junkrat : Why? Does it include work? Ugh, I can't stand work!

Junkrat : Y'know, we could always use a little extra firepower. The vault doors on these banks are gettin' awful thick! Mauga : Your piggie friend not enough? Junkrat : We would never say no to more mayhem! *laughs* Mauga : Yeah... Mako doesn't strike me as the sharing type.
Junkrat : It's a little dark out there. Mauga : Then let's light it up! Junkrat : *laughs* This bloke gets it!
Mauga : You gotta give me some pointers on being more stealthy. Kiriko : I can't picture you sneaking up on anyone. Mauga : Y'know, I might just surprise you.
Lúcio : So, I'm tryna ask everybody this: what is your favorite animal? Mauga : Hammerhead. That's the best shark, no question. Lúcio : Uh... yeah, I can see it!
Lúcio : You got a hobby? Y'know, besides going around the world making miserable. Mauga : I was gonna say listening to your tunes... Lúcio : Seriously? Mauga : But that'd be lying.
Mercy : Someone your size should donate blood more frequently than the average person. Mauga : You need more? I can get you more.
Mercy : I keep forgetting to calibrate my staff to your higher temperature. Mauga : Thanks for reminding me that I'm hot stuff. Mercy : More like the stuff of medical nightmares...
Mauga : Angela! *chuckle* I can call you Angela, right? Mercy : For you? Doctor Ziegler. Mauga : Aw... I'm a little hurt... "Doctor".
Mauga : Why the look, doc? Did I do something? Mercy : Besides weaponizing illegal medical enhancements? Mauga : What, that's all? Whew! Thought you found out about some other things...
Moira : You are remembering to take your supplements? Mauga : Look at these guns and ask me again.

Mauga : Hey-hey, hey! Looks like my favorite doctor stuck around with Talon ! Moira : As did you, unsurprisingly. I don't believe any other organization could tolerate you. Mauga : Aw, you're just sayin' that! Moira : I assure you: I mean every word.
Mauga : I got some good ideas for some bad robots. Think you could introduce me to Efi ? Orisa : Perhaps, once you've gotten out of prison.
Mauga : Bet I can put a smile on that face of yours. Reaper : You'd lose that bet. Mauga : Even if I whip up some bloodshed, just for you? Reaper : Mmm. Dammit.
Mauga : * groan * Man, I'm starving. Reinhardt : Starving for justice? Mauga : God, I'm allergic to that.
Mauga : Gonna enjoy filling that shield with bullets. Reinhardt : Ugh. Can't you wait until after this mission? Mauga : Don't worry. * chuckle * Just thinking ahead.
Mauga : *chuckles* That armor of yours could use some bullet holes. Reinhardt : And your confidence could use some pounding with my hammer!

Mauga : If it isn't my favorite piggie pal! Been up to no good lately? Roadhog : I'm not your pal. Mauga : Well, how about swine sibling? My ham slice? Porkie pie? Roadhog : How about shut your snout?
Mauga : How are the rates for mercenaries down there? Roadhog : Modest. Mauga : Tsk, no one pays what we're worth.
Mauga : Ha! Remember me, Captain? From the Blacksand Fires near Tahiti? Sojourn : Yeah. You still have our chainguns, I see. Mauga : Yup! Getting some good mileage out of 'em.
Mauga : Shame you didn't play a real tackle game. Soldier: 76 : Football isn't a game, kid.
Mauga : I hear you can find just about anyone. Sombra : Mauga, no. Mauga : Hey, I know you miss him too. We could have a little party! Sombra : You're bad for him in every way that counts.

Sombra : Try not to destroy anything valuable this time. Mauga : Is someone still mad I burnt down the server room? Sombra : I lost a lot of bank account numbers, and my favorite pizza recipes! Mauga : Not the pizza!

Mauga : I can't believe you ditched Talon ! All my buddies are leaving me behind... Sombra : I'm not taking orders from some self-righteous maniac. Oh, and I'm not your buddy. ' Mauga : Wha-- *sniffle* No... not anymore...
Mauga : So you're a dancer, huh? I enjoy it myself. Symmetra : That is something of a surprise. What style do you prefer? Mauga : Oh, I make other people dance. With my bullets.
Symmetra : Vishkar is offering a large sum for your arrest. Mauga : And what, they sent you to intimidate me?

Mauga: Better watch it, kid, or those relics might end up in my pocket. Venture: Don't do that! You don't even know their cultural value! Mauga: Uh, I know the value of 'a lot of money'. Venture: Well... I know the value of... 'bopping you on the head'!
Mauga: When are you gonna give me my cut of all those treasures? Venture: When are you gonna stop being a big doofus? Mauga: You first. Venture: You second! Oh... shoot.

Venture : You'd better not mess with any of the relics here. Mauga : Why not? If anything breaks, you can just buy another from the store. Venture : You can't just... "buy another" millennia-old statue, bozo! Mauga : *laughs* You're too funny, kid. *sigh* Now I'm gonna break some stuff on purpose...
Mauga : Admit it, spider: you think I'm all right. Widowmaker : Well, you are loud, boorish, and annoying. Mauga : ..."But"? Widowmaker : I was done talking.
Mauga : I've always wanted to pet a gorilla. Winston : *nervous chuckle* How about a firm handshake, with the guns down?

Mauga : Aww, what a cute little buddy! Wrecking Ball : The hamster prefers the adjective: "ruthless." Mauga : What a ruthless little buddy! Wrecking Ball : *bashful hamster noises* He appreciates the revision.
Mauga : Champion Aleksandra Zaryanova! Woah. I'm a huge fan! Zarya : Yes, you are huge. And loud.

Mauga : They never let me compete in those weightlifting tournaments. Zarya : Why not? Mauga : The two hearts thing... Agh, "unfair advantages," blah, blah, blah. Zarya : You still would have lost to me.
Zarya : You talk big, but can you deliver? Mauga : With a big red bow on top! Zarya : I prefer pink. Mauga : For you? I can make it happen.
Zarya : I'm the muscle of the team. Mauga : No, I'm the muscle! Zarya : Well, you're certainly not the brains. Mauga : * chuckles * I like you.
Mauga : You look like a vanilla protein powder kinda girl. Zarya : Wrong. I take unflavored, with water. Mauga : You know you can be tough and still have taste, right?
Zenyatta : It is often those with the loudest voice who have the most to lose. Mauga : Good thing I always win!
map-specific: When are they gonna make a super car my size?
Hey, look. You could see the super coral from here.
Makes you feel really small. Okay! Let's go break some beakers.
These tiny streets can't cage me in.
Ha ha! Not to brag, but I'm kind of a big thing around these parts.
This is home turf , bud! (final blow)
